div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2

t.div: No hay órdenes de mantenimiento disponibles.

div.class: card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill text-bg-#{ 'success' if maint_request.stage_id.done else 'secondary' if maint_request.stage_id.fold else 'primary'} fs-6 px-3 py-2

template.name: Portal My Home: Servicios de Taller

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2

t.div: No hay servicios de taller disponibles.

div.class: card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill text-bg-#{ 'success' if maint_request.stage_id.done else 'secondary' if maint_request.stage_id.fold else 'primary'} fs-6 px-3 py-2

input.name: name
input.placeholder: Descripción breve del trabajo a realizar
